creator: cth-freebsd@pm.me
text:
(In reply to Ale from comment #0)

I think it is the solution (though it really ought to be merged upstream, if they'll accept it). It should have no effect on previous compilers since it was already included implicitly, but now that some system headers have changed it no longer is. It needs to be included explicitly. 

For now I did the same, and created a patch against it that I attached.
